text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We hear that Oguri Cap and Super Creek plan on
returning to racing once summer camp is over.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One is fired up and ready to work hard at
camp so she can gain the strength and skills
needed to surpass the two of them.
